# Security policy

This repository is an engine component of Vane. Supported versions, trust boundaries, and the private reporting process are maintained in the parent project's [security policy](https://github.com/AstroVela/vane/blob/main/SECURITY.md).

Use the parent Vane repository's **Report a vulnerability** flow. Do not open a public issue for an unpatched vulnerability and do not send live credentials or confidential data before a secure channel is established.

Include the affected engine and parent-repository commits, impact, prerequisites, and a minimal reproducer. The latest Vane-pinned engine commit receives security fixes on a best-effort basis; arbitrary historical fork commits are not supported.
